description: You are a sustainability specialist setting up a standardized openLCA workspace. Create a category hierarchy in the 'Processes' folder with four top-level categories: 'Energy Supply' (containing sub-categories 'Grid Electricity' and 'On-site Generation'), 'Raw Materials' (containing 'Metals' and 'Polymers'), 'Transportation and Logistics' (containing 'Road Freight' and 'Ocean Freight'), and 'End of Life' (containing 'Landfill' and 'Recycling'). Inside each of the four top-level categories, create a corresponding empty process named 'Placeholder - Energy Supply', 'Placeholder - Raw Materials', 'Placeholder - Transportation', and 'Placeholder - End of Life'. Document the completed hierarchy in a text file at '~/LCA_Results/esg_taxonomy_report.txt'.
